## Type of change

## Safety checks

- [ ] I did not commit `db.json`
- [ ] I did not commit `.env`
- [ ] I did not commit exports/reports/backups
- [ ] `npm.cmd run check:syntax` passes locally
- [ ] Relevant dry-run command was tested
